description: Hantavirus cluster associated with the MV Hondius expedition vessel. Cases reported across multiple nationalities. WHO confirmed 5 hantavirus cases, 3 suspected, and 3 deaths as of 7 May 2026.
verificationNotes: WHO DON (4 May 2026): 7 total cases — 2 confirmed, 5 suspected, 3 deaths. WHO Update (7 May 2026): 8 total cases — 5 confirmed, 3 suspected, 3 deaths. Numbers revised upward as laboratory results confirmed additional cases.
